name: Code助手
description: Claude Code / Codex CLI 飞书交互卡通知与远程输入系统。

scripts.feishu-listener:start: nohup node feishu-listener.js >> feishu-listener.log 2>&1 & echo $! > feishu-listener.pid && echo 'Feishu listener started (PID: '$(cat feishu-listener.pid)')'
scripts.feishu-listener:stop: if [ -f feishu-listener.pid ]; then kill $(cat feishu-listener.pid) 2>/dev/null; rm feishu-listener.pid; echo 'Feishu listener stopped'; else echo 'No PID file found'; fi
scripts.codex-watcher:start: nohup node src/apps/codex-watcher.js >> codex-watcher.log 2>&1 & PID=$!; echo $PID > codex-watcher.pid; sleep 1; if kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Codex watcher started (PID: '$PID')'; else echo 'Codex watcher failed to stay alive; check codex-watcher.log'; tail -n 40 codex-watcher.log; exit 1; fi
scripts.codex-watcher:stop: if [ -f codex-watcher.pid ]; then kill $(cat codex-watcher.pid) 2>/dev/null; rm codex-watcher.pid; echo 'Codex watcher stopped'; else pkill -f 'node src/apps/codex-watcher.js' 2>/dev/null && echo 'Codex watcher stopped (pkill)' || echo 'No watcher process found'; fi
